name: Bitfarms Ltd.
description: Bitfarms Ltd. is a global Bitcoin mining company that operates vertically integrated mining operations. The company designs, builds, and operates server farms, primarily powered by environmentally friendly hydro-electric power. Bitfarms provides computing power to cryptocurrency networks, earning fees from securing and processing transactions on the blockchain. Founded in 2017, the company is headquartered in Toronto, Canada, and operates multiple data centers across North America and South America.
